dsl_rule.translation_notes: Belt Hold reversal pattern interpreted as: price touches support (s1), returns toward it without significant decline (small body_pct), stays above lower support (s2). Entry SHORT on these conditions within a trading range. Exit when price breaks back above support (s1). Used pivot support levels (s1, s2) as proxies for support zone since no explicit support zone indicator exists. Small body_pct indicates minimal downward movement after return to support, consistent with pattern definition.

source_rule_text: Belt Hold: A reversal pattern where price leaves a support zone and returns without falling far, indicating a potential reversal within or near a trading range
